channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Strategy tops up capital-raising plans, bringing potential bitcoin buying power back to $42 billion
item.description: Expanded share issuance plans and new Wall Street partners boost capital raising firepower.

item.title: Strategy Unveils $44 Billion Plan to Buy More Bitcoin, Driven By MSTR and STRC Shares
item.description: Strategy shared plans to issue $44 billion in equity, a move aimed at providing its Bitcoin-buying machine with fuel for future purchases.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Pharmaceutical firm pivots to stablecoins, holds nearly 9% of SKY's supply
item.description: Nanocap NovaBay Pharmaceuticals changed its name to Stablecoin Development Corporation.

item.title: Senate bill to target sports betting ban on prediction markets: WSJ
item.description: A bipartisan Senate bill would reportedly ban sports betting and casino-style contracts on prediction markets.

item.title: Backpack launches BP token on Solana with 25% airdrop, no insider allocation
item.description: The remaining tokens are subject to long-term lockups tied to company milestones and a potential IPO.

item.title: Spain arrests suspect in 2025 kidnapping of Ledger co-founder
item.description: Spain’s Civil Guard detained a suspect wanted by France over the 2025 kidnapping of Ledger co-founder David Balland, in a case tied to a wider wave of crypto-targeted abductions.

item.title: Crypto ETF inflows slow to $230M as Fed caution dents momentum: CoinShares
item.description: Weekly crypto ETP inflows reached $230 million despite $405 million in post-FOMC outflows, as Bitcoin led gains and Ether ended a three-week inflow streak, CoinShares reported.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) gains 2.3%, leading index higher
item.description: Solana (SOL), up 1% from Friday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds to $71K as oil drops after Trump signals pause on Iran strikes
item.description: Bitcoin moved back above $71,000 after US President Donald Trump postponed Iran strike for five days, sending oil price crashing below $100.

item.title: Crypto Markets Grapple With Volatility as ETFs Shed $177M Last Week
item.description: Crypto ETFs shed $177M last week as Bitcoin pulled back from $75,000, though experts remain bullish on Q2's prospects.

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine extends buying streak with $138 million ETH purchase, betting on crypto slump ending
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm led by Thomas Lee now has increased its buying pace for three consecutive weeks even as unrealized losses mount.

item.title: How a ‘Wrong Number’ message turned into a $3.4M crypto scam
item.description: A simple “wrong number” message led to a $3.4 million crypto scam, exposing social engineering tactics, fake investments and fund laundering methods.

item.title: Siren token surges 340% in 7 days, draws scrutiny over concentrated supply
item.description: Arkham data shows a wallet cluster holding 644 million SIREN, about 88% of the 728 million circulating supply, raising manipulation concerns.

item.title: Bitcoin's wild roller coaster ride leaves leveraged traders with $415 million in liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin swung from $67,500 to $71,200 and back to $70,000 in a single session as Trump said he was postponing Iran strikes, then Iran denied any communication was taking place.

item.title: H100 eyes Europe’s largest bitcoin treasury with 3,500 BTC in proposed acquistions
item.description: Proposed bitcoin-for-bitcoin acquisition of Moonshot and Never Say Die would triple the company's holdings and expand institutional scale.

item.title: Strategy adds 1,031 Bitcoin for $77M as holdings top 762,000 BTC
item.description: Strategy bought 1,031 Bitcoin for $76.6 million, lifting holdings to 762,099 BTC, as the company relied on common stock sales to fund the purchase.

item.title: Airdrops rewarded extraction and ended real communities
item.description: Airdrops trained extraction over loyalty. Token sales return with privacy-preserving identity to reward conviction and build real, automation-resistant communities.

item.title: Strategy returns to 'small' bitcoin purchases, adding $76.6 million in BTC last week
item.description: Led by Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, Strategy acquired 1,031 bitcoin, bringing holdings to 762,099 coins.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rips as Iran Strikes Postponed
item.description: Crypto is soaring on a major development in the Iran war, while A Senate deal could finally unlock the Clarity Act.

item.title: Bitcoin Tops $71,000 as Trump Postpones Iran Power Plant Strike Plans
item.description: The price move came after Donald Trump touted "productive conversations" regarding a cessation of hostilities in the Middle East.

item.title: Strategy has acquired 1,031 BTC for ~$76.6 million at ~$74,326 per bitcoin. As of 3/22/2026, we hodl 762,099 $BTC acquired for ~$57.69 billion at ~$75,694 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBGT3g2dnRtcDY3d1liQWdqQklBV1BLT0l1VzBsYTZyUWJKLTdybHNrRlA2akV5UmxnZmNEZ2VHRDdSUFRnMEpGeHdkM084S0hmTzI3ZndRS2phdjA?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy has acquired 1,031 BTC for ~$76.6 …

item.title: Brazil’s finance minister delays divisive crypto tax plan
item.description: The proposed tax would classify some crypto transactions as foreign exchange operations, subject to rates ranging to as high as 3.5%.

item.title: Stablecoins seen gaining from AI payments despite slow uptake: Bernstein
item.description: Stablecoins could benefit from the rise of AI-driven payments over time, even as early adoption remains limited and contested, according to a new report.

item.title: Bitcoin surges above $71,000 as Trump postpones Iran strikes for 5 days
item.description: Trump said that the two countries held "very good and productive conversations regarding a complete and total resolution of our hostilities in the Middle East."

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Oil prices plunge over 10% on Trump's war remarks. This is INSANE! - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE03dl9CbUJ4aFptV24xdVdyWVlqZUFCYnB6cVEzYTRTYnpVQW15Q3p2UFdjWGNzSmFYek5EdVZEWEpKV295TWpGS19YV0I3bjB2N0pubzZicHZzX3NCYTVvOElB?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Oil prices plunge over…

item.title: Polymarket traders bet on Iran ceasefire even as oil shock concerns persist
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 23, 2026

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Trump says U.S. and Iran had “productive talks” and is postponing planned strikes for 5 days. De-escalation in play. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1RMkt3dU90N011d3lnSU9RNndLbEh3bjJzWTBSTUtQZG1ZTUFQU1hKVE40Y2lIbV80bzU1WnFIVW5fQjBSclNaalJGOVVGYVNPTmNINlRidmpBd0ZBWE83TmxR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Trump says U.S. and Ir…

item.title: Resolv Labs Stablecoin Depegs, Plunges 74% After $25M Exploit
item.description: A compromised key enabled an attacker to illegally mint 80 million USR tokens, causing the stablecoin to lose its dollar peg.

item.title: Bitcoin retreats to $68,000, leaving CME gap as traders eye $70,000 rebound
item.description: BTC slipped back into February's range after Donald Trump threatened to attack Iran's power plants, sparking a selloff and shifting flows toward commodities.

item.title: Bitcoin clings to monthly gains, historic losing streak still in play
item.description: Bitcoin shows early signs of outperformance against gold, with the BTC gold ratio rebounding toward 16 ounces after a steep cycle drawdown.

item.title: Gold slides as traders eye sub-$50K BTC: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders kept sub-$50,000 BTC price targets in play as gold entered a bear market over Iran and oil-supply instability.

item.title: Bitcoin's momentum indicator is flashing a signal that should worry bulls
item.description: A key momentum indicator that has been accurate at calling price selloffs since October just triggered.

item.title: ZachXBT says fake X accounts used viral war content to drive crypto scams
item.description: ZachXBT said the network of fake X accounts used AI to impersonate influencers and post sensational content, generating millions of views and six-figure profits from crypto scams.

item.title: Sweden’s H100 eyes Europe’s No. 2 Bitcoin treasury with 3,500 BTC deal
item.description: H100 signed a letter of intent to acquire two Bitcoin treasury companies and their BTC holdings, which could make it the second-largest Bitcoin treasury company in Europe.

item.title: Fed's Miran speaks, Bitgo earnings, Casper hard fork: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 23.

item.title: Prosecutors flag mail discrepancies in Sam Bankman-Fried’s retrial motion letter from prison
item.description: A letter attributed to the jailed FTX founder was shipped via FedEx and misidentified his prison, prompting prosecutors to question its authenticity

item.title: Bithumb seeks to reappoint CEO despite recent controversies: Report
item.description: Bithumb was reportedly given a six-month partial suspension by South Korea’s Financial Intelligence Unit for alleged anti-money laundering failures.

item.title: Resolv stablecoin crashes 70% as attacker extracts $25 million in ETH
item.description: The protocol holds $95 million in assets against $173 million in liabilities, leaving it functionally insolvent. USR is trading at $0.27, down 72% in a week.

item.title: Oil, silver trading is way more popular than XRP, solana on Hyperliquid
item.description: Traders on decentralized exchange Hyperliquid are increasingly favoring perpetual futures tied to commodities.

item.title: 🩸CRASH: Absolute bloodbath in Asian markets today as they open for the first time since Trump gave a 48-hour deadline to Iran. $700+ billion wiped out. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1yQW93SWhaamlBRW5LRHhWRWdXZVZrTmN6V2lrZmxOT0tmUjFfbC1Ib2pCMUlvSkFYUWhPNDhpMDZYaGNaOGRkUUFwcDljZFMwa0dERUVWS1ZDTXdlQWhFelN3?oc=5" target="_blank">🩸CRASH: Absolute bloodbath in Asi…

item.title: Global turmoil pushes uptake of decentralized messengers, social media
item.description: Bitchat saw a spike in downloads during protests in Madagascar, Nepal, Indonesia and Iran over the last year, and global unrest could see more cases like it.

item.title: CoinDCX Rebukes Fraud Allegations, Points to Impersonation Scam in Police Probe
item.description: One of India's largest crypto exchanges said the move is based on a coordinated fraud using fake CoinDCX identities.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇨🇳 ¥2,700,000,000,000 has been wiped out from the Chinese stock market today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFA1U192cnA5NzA1UzM3T1pQekNwS1B3WmVCbVU4RDdzNzdrOVpyejUwS3lUZzMwMy00QW9NM3M5Y0tNbTVaa3VmZ2JmaEtvZHdsMDlUaHZlcGNHTkJQS1BhR3Nn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: 🇨🇳 ¥2,700,000,000,00…

item.title: What to Expect From This Week's House Committee on Tokenization
item.description: Lawmakers are expected to weigh steps toward on-chain securities, even as the bigger legal and investor risks remain unresolved.

item.title: Stocks start catching up with bitcoin’s earlier price crash to $60,000 as bond yields rise
item.description: Stocks look to be catching with BTC's earlier crash to nearly $60,000.

item.title: Hong Kong’s Boyaa Interactive eyes $70M crypto treasury expansion
item.description: Boyaa Interactive International is the 23rd-largest Bitcoin treasury and the third-largest in Asia, behind Japan’s Metaplanet and China’s Next Technology Holding.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg is building an AI agent to help run Meta
item.description: The Meta co-founder is reportedly working on a personal AI agent to bypass management layers as Meta pushes employees to adopt agentic tools.

item.title: JUST IN: THE CFTC AND SEC'S GUIDANCE CLARIFYING #BITCOIN AND CRYPTO LAW OFFICIALLY GOES INTO EFFECT TODAY 10 YEARS OF UNCERTAINTY ARE OFFICIALLY OVER ₿RAND NEW DAY 🚀 - x.com

item.title: XRP drops 3.7% as break below $1.40 signals renewed downside risk
item.description: Traders are watching the $1.38–$1.40 zone after repeated failures to reclaim resistance.

item.title: Crypto, stocks fall as oil whipsaws after Iran vows response to Trump threat
item.description: Bitcoin and Asian markets dropped on Monday as Iran escalated threats to strike critical infrastructure in the Gulf.

item.title: Agentic AI commerce may spell the end of internet ads: a16z Crypto
item.description: “The internet is civilization’s town square, and the economic contract is now obsolete,” wrote Sam Ragsdale on an a16z Crypto blog on Sunday.

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: Ethereum OG who received 172,700 $ETH for $2.2M a decade ago (now worth $356M) sold 15,002 $ETH for $30.97M. - x.com

item.title: Michael Saylor hints at Bitcoin buy as Strategy’s stack slips 10% into the red
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin-holding company Strategy has already purchased more than $2.9 billion worth of the cryptocurrency this month.

item.title: Ethereum builder @thomasg_eth is also selling low and buying high $ETH. On March 3, he sold 12,131 $ETH($24.24M) at $1,998. Then, in the past week, he bought 10,209 $ETH($22.58M) back at an average price of $2,211. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin Price Slides but Holds Up Better Than Stocks as Oil Shock Continues
item.description: Earlier deleveraging and continued institutional participation have helped keep Bitcoin more stable than other risk assets during the recent macro-driven selloff.

item.title: The Resolv Hack: How One Compromised Key Printed $23 Million
item.description: On March 22, 2026, the Resolv DeFi protocol became the latest example of how quickly things can unravel in DeFi… The post The Resolv Hack: How One Compromised Key Printed $23 Million appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: 💥BREAKING: 🇮🇷 Iran is moving to charge up to $2M per tanker to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. The world’s most critical oil route... now a toll gate. - x.com
